[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00110111 5
1 11000111 5
2 01111011 6
3 01111111 7
4 11111111 a
5 01111111 7
6 00110110 4
7 11000100 3

01 10000100 2
12 00001001 2
23 00110010 3
34 11000100 3 match 7
45 00110000 2
56 00000100 1
67 00000000 a
70 01011010 4

02 10000001 2
13 00101011 4
24 00000110 2
35 10000000 1
46 00100000 1
57 00000000 a
60 01011010 4
71 01010100 3

47 00000000 a

61 01010000 2
72 01001001 3

26 00100100 2
37 10000000 1
40 00010000 1
51 01000100 2

73 00111011 5

05 10100000 2

27 00000000 a

41 00010000 1

17 00000000 a

07 10000000 1

32 11000000 2
